buysell.dialog.disclaimerText: Yoroi Wallet utilizes third-party web3 on-and-off ramp solutions for direct Fiat-ADA exchanges.  By clicking "Proceed," you acknowledge that you will be redirected to our partner's website, where you may need to accept their terms and conditions.  Please note, the third party web3 solution may have limitations based on your location and financial institution.
buysell.dialog.error.dialog.title: url generation
buysell.dialog.fail.text: This service is currently unavailable. Please try again later.
buysell.dialog.longloading.text: We are redirecting you outside Yoroi. Please wait.
buysell.dialog.title: Buy / Sell ADA
buysell.end.text: Congrats! 🎉 Your transaction is now in progress. You should be receiving the funds soon.
buySell.disclaimer.title: Disclaimer
buySell.disclaimer.description: By clicking "Proceed," you acknowledge that you will be redirected to a third-party service provider offering Web3 on-and-off ramp solutions for fiat-to-ADA exchanges. You may be required to agree to the terms, conditions, and privacy policies of the third-party provider to complete the transaction. Yoroi Wallet does not control, endorse, or assume responsibility for the content, security, policies, or services provided by the third party.
buySell.disclaimer.note1: Yoroi Wallet is not liable for any losses, delays, or errors that may occur while using the third-party service.
buySell.disclaimer.note2: Transactions may be subject to restrictions based on your geographic location, applicable laws, financial institution policies, or the service provider's limitations.
buySell.disclaimer.note3: Ensure you review and understand the third party's terms, as your interactions are solely governed by their agreements.
buySell.disclaimer.note4: Yoroi Wallet does not collect or store any personal or financial data submitted through the third-party platform.

profile.complexityLevel.advanced.descrip: ブロックチェーン、およびブロックチェーンやウォレットソフトウェアにおける暗号の働きについて、ある程度理解しています。これらに対する理解が必要となる、高度なオプションや機能が表示されることに問題はありません。

profile.complexityLevel.simple.descripti: シンプルな表示設定でご利用いただけます。ブロックチェーンの予備知識に不安があるという方でも安心です。初心者の方や、簡単に設定したい方におすすめです。
profile.complexityLevel.subtitle: ブロックチェーンの概念を十分に理解することは容易ではありません。そこで、できる限りシンプルに活用できるインターフェイスをご提供いたします
profile.complexityLevel.title: 表示情報の詳細レベル

profile.nightly.acknowledgedRisks: リスクについて理解しました
profile.nightly.header: ヨロイNightlyは毎日夜間に自動アップデートを行い開発中の最新機能を適用します。バグや破損したコードが故意に含まれることはありませんが、適用される機能は開発段階のものであり、エラーが含まれる場合があります。
profile.nightly.recommendation1: You only use wallets with a small balance to minimize risk.
profile.nightly.recommendation2: ヨロイNightlyチャンネルからEMURGOに問題を報告します。
profile.nightly.title: ヨロイNightly
profile.nightly.warning1: ヨロイNightlyは模擬ブロックチェーンやテストサーバー上では運用されません。
profile.nightly.warning2: 送信したトランザクションはチェーン上、および本番サーバーで可視化されます。
profile.nightly.warningHeader: 本番環境のシミュレーションを行うには、以下を実施してください。

settings.general.aboutYoroi.label: ヨロイについて
settings.general.languageSelect.info: ヨロイがユーザーにとって親しみやすいインターフェイスを持つことは重要だと、EMURGOは考えています。ユーザーの母国語であれば、ブロックチェーンの概念を理解するのもより容易になるはずです。EMURGOは出来る限り多くの言語をサポートしようとしていますが、多数の言語のサポートにはコミュニティの翻訳者の協力が必要です。サポートする言語の翻訳は、コミュニティにより提供されています。
settings.general.languageSelect.labelInf: 選択された言語はコミュニティーによって翻訳された内容になります

swap.actions.slippageToleranceTooltip: Slippage tolerance is set as a percentage of the total swap value. Your transactions will not be executed if the price moves by more than this amount
swap.actions.slippageToleranceHigh: When the slippage tolerance is set really high, it allows the transaction to still complete despite large price swings. This can open the door to front-running and sandwich attacks.
swap.cancelOrder.title: Cancel order
swap.cancelOrder.content: Are you sure you want to cancel this order?
swap.totalReturnedTooltip: The amount returned to your wallet after cancelling the order
swap.limitPriceTooltip: Limit price in a DEX is a specific pre-set price at which you can trade an asset. Unlike market orders, which execute immediately at the current market price, limit orders are set to execute only when the market reaches the trader's specified price.
swap.limitPriceContent: Are you sure you want to proceed this order with the limit price that is 10% or more higher than the market price?
swap.marketPriceTooltip: Market price is the best price available on the market among several DEXes that lets you buy or sell an asset instantly
swap.priceImpactTooltip: Price impact is a difference between the actual market price and your price due to trade size.
swap.priceImpactSevere: Price impact over 10% may cause a significant loss of funds. Please bear this in mind and proceed with an extra caution.
swap.priceImpactNotSevere: Price impact over 1% may cause a difference in the amount you actually receive. Consider this at your own risk.
swap.noAssetFoundToSwap: No asset was found to swap
swap.pairNotAvailable: Selected pair is not available in any liquidity pool
swap.adaDepositTooltip: A small ADA deposit that will be returned when your order is processed or canceled
swap.minimumAssetsTooltip: The minimum amount you are guaranteed to receive in case of price slippage
swap.lpFeeTooltip: A fixed 0.3% operational fee paid to liquidity providers as a reward for supplying tokens, enabling traders to buy and sell assets on the decentralized Cardano network
swap.checkTx: Check this transaction in the list of wallet transactions
swap.txNotProcessed: Your transaction has not been processed properly due to technical issues
swap.notEnoughBalanceFees: Not enough balance, please consider the fees
swap.startDoingSwaps: Start doing the swap operations to see your open orders here
transfer.form.instructions.step1.text: 残高が復元されるまで1分程度かかります。復元後、ダイダロスウォレットからヨロイウォレットへの送金取引が表示されます。トランザクションの詳細を慎重に確認してください。 トランザクションを行うには、Cardanoネットワークの標準トランザクション手数料を支払う必要があります。

wallet.add.optionDialog.connect.hw.dialo: ハードウェアウォレットに接続
wallet.add.optionDialog.connect.hw.ledge: Ledgerのいうハードウェアウォレットはウォレットのセキュリティを高める小さなUSB機器です。秘密鍵がハードウェアウォレットから出力されることは無いので、さらに高い安全性を担保します。お使いのコンピューターがマルウェアやフィッシング詐欺などにより損なわれたとしても、資金は守られます。
Ledgerハードウェアウォレット
wallet.add.optionDialog.connect.hw.trezo: Trezorのハードウェアウォレットはウォレットのセキュリティを高める小さなUSB機器です。秘密鍵がハードウェアウォレットから出力されることは無いので、さらに高い安全性を担保します。お使いのコンピューターがマルウェアやフィッシング詐欺などにより損なわれたとしても、資金は守られます。
Trezorハードウェアウォレット

wallet.add.optionDialog.restore.normalWa: If you have a recovery phrase consisting of {length} words, choose this option to restore your wallet.
wallet.add.optionDialog.restore.paperWal: 通常印刷してオフラインで保管するものですが、ヨロイのペーパーウォレットをお持ちの方はこのオプションを選択してペーパーウォレットの残高をヨロイウォレットにインポートすることができます。
wallet.add.optionDialog.walletEra.byronE: Wallets created before July 29th, 2020 are Byron-era wallets and cannot delegate.

wallet.backup.dialog.legacy.checkConfirm: ウォレットのアップグレードが必要かどうかのチェックを行いますか？
wallet.backup.dialog.legacy.explanation: 2019年11月29日の時点でヨロイウォレットにADAを保管していた場合は、ウォレットをShelley用「報酬ウォレット」にアップグレードする必要があります。
wallet.backup.dialog.legacy.upgrade: ウォレットアップグレード
wallet.backup.privacy.warning.dialog.che: 他人に画面を見られないよう注意してください。
wallet.backup.privacy.warning.dialog.rec: 次の画面では、15個のランダムな英単語のセットが表示されます。これは、 ウォレットをバックアップするための復元フレーズです。ヨロイのどのバージョンにも入力でき、 ウォレットの資金と秘密鍵を、バックアップまたは復元することができます。
wallet.backup.recovery.phrase.display.di:
復元フレーズは、安全な場所に保存してください。
次回のウォレット使用時や復元の際に使用します。復元フレーズでは大文字と小文字が区別されます。
wallet.backup.recovery.phrase.entry.dial: 秘密鍵は、お客様のデバイスにのみ保管され、弊社のサーバーには保管されませんことを理解しています。

このアプリケーションを別のデバイスに移動するか削除した場合、
    安全な場所に書き留められたバックアップフレーズでのみ資金を復元できることを理解しています。
各単語を正しい順序でタップして復元フレーズを確認する

wallet.create.dialog.howToSaveRecoveryPh: Make sure no one is looking at your screen.
It is recommended to have 2 or 3 copies of the recovery phrase in different secure locations.
Write the recovery phrase on a piece of paper and store in a secure location like a safety deposit box.
How to save your recovery phrase?
wallet.create.dialog.name.label: ウォレット名
wallet.create.dialog.repeatPasswordField: 送金パスワードを再入力してください
wallet.create.dialog.repeatPasswordLabel: 送金パスワードを再入力してください
Remember: you are the only person who should know this recovery phrase.
DO NOT share the recovery phrase as this will allow anyone to access your assets and wallet.
If you lose your recovery phrase, it will not be possible to recover your wallet.
The recovery phrase is the only way to access your wallet.
Yoroi will NEVER ask for the recovery phrase. Watch out for scammers and impersonators.
Read this before saving your recovery phrase
wallet.create.dialog.title: ウォレットを作成
wallet.create.dialog.walletChecksum.firs: {plateImg} Wallet checksum is a generic Blockie image that is generated to visually distinguish your wallet from others.

wallet.create.dialog.walletNameAndPasswo: It is a wallet identifier that helps you to easier find the exact wallet in your app
You can have different wallet names for the same wallet account connected to different devices
Password is an additional security layer used to confirm transactions from this device
Both wallet name and password are stored locally, so you are only person who can change or restore it.

このトランザクションのメモを削除しますか？
削除するとすべてのコピーが消去され、二度と復元することはできません。

wallet.transfer.deregister.line1: When withdrawing rewards, you also have the option to deregister the staking key
wallet.transfer.deregister.line2: Deregistering the staking key will give you back your deposit and undelegate the key from any pool
wallet.transfer.deregister.line3: Keeping the staking key will allow you to withdraw the rewards, but continue delegating to the same pool
wallet.transfer.deregister.line4: You should NOT deregister if this staking key is used as a stake pool's reward account, as this will cause all pool operator rewards to be sent back to the reserved
wallet.transfer.deregister.line5: Deregistering means this key will no longer receive rewards until you re-register the staking key (usually by delegating to a pool again)
wallet.transfer.deregister.noNeedToDereg: You do NOT need to deregister to delegate to a different stake pool. You can change your delegation preference at any time
wallet.transfer.deregister.title: Also deregister the staking key?
wallet.transfer.instruction: Any {ticker} claimed will be transferred to your currently selected wallet
wallet.transfer.subInstruction: Learn more about Byron and Shelley eras and how to claim ADA on our
wallet.transitionDialog.currentStakePool: The current stake pool you're using will soon close. Migrate to the new EMURGO pool to sustain reward generation.
wallet.transitionDialog.poolContinues: This pool continues to generate staking rewards
wallet.transitionDialog.poolStop: This pool will stop generating staking rewards in
wallet.transitionDialog.poolNotGeneratin: This pool is NOT generating staking rewards anymore
wallet.undelegation.transaction.warning: Your rewards will automatically get withdrawn once you undelegate from a stake pool. You will also receive back your staking deposit of 2 ADA. If you wish to choose another stake pool, you can change your preference without undelegation.
wallet.unsupported.subtitle: The selected wallet does not support this functionality
wallet.unsupported.title: Wallet type not supported
wallet.voting.dialog.step.confirm.line1: Please enter the PIN as you will need it every time you want to access the Catalyst Voting app.
wallet.voting.dialog.step.pin.actionButt: Confirm that I wrote down the PIN
wallet.voting.dialog.step.pin.line1: Please write down this PIN as you will need it every time you want to access the Catalyst Voting app.
wallet.voting.dialog.step.qr.actionButto: Confirm that I saved the QR code
wallet.voting.dialog.step.qr.line2: The following QR code is the generated certificate required by the Catalyst App to be able to participate in the voting process of Cardano.
wallet.voting.dialog.step.qr.line3: Also we suggest to take a screenshot of it as a backup — you won’t be able to access this QR code after clicking Complete.
wallet.voting.dialog.step.qr.lineTitle: Use the Catalyst Voting App to scan the QR code
wallet.voting.dialog.step.register.line1: Enter your spending password to be able to generate the required certificate for voting.
wallet.voting.dialog.step.trx.ledger.inf: After connecting your Ledger device to your computer’s USB port, press the Register button.
wallet.voting.dialog.step.trx.line1: Confirm your spending password to register in the blockchain the certificate previously generated for voting.
wallet.voting.dialog.step.trx.trezor.inf: After connecting your Trezor device to your computer, press the Register button.
wallet.voting.dialog.title: Register for Voting
wallet.voting.keepDelegated: Your voting power is how much you delegate and the voting rewards will be distributed to your delegation reward address. Please keep delegated until the voting ends.
wallet.voting.ledgerNanoRequirement: Update the Cardano app on your Ledger to version 6 or above with Ledger Live.
wallet.voting.line2: Before you begin, make sure to complete steps below
wallet.voting.line4: Open the Catalyst Voting App and click on the Complete registration button.
wallet.voting.notDelegated: You haven't delegated anything. Your voting power is determined by the amount you delegate and voting rewards are distributed to your delegation reward address. Please remember to delegate prior to voting.
wallet.voting.trezorTRequirement: Update your Trezor Model T firmware version to 2.4.1 or above.
